openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer:
**No one has won the 2026 Ballon d’Or yet.**

As of **July 14, 2026**, the official ceremony is scheduled for **October 26, 2026, in London**, so no credible official winner currently exists. Articles naming Harry Kane, Kylian Mbappé, or others are only forecasts or “power rankings,” not results.

Sources: [UEFA ceremony announcement](https://www.uefa.com/ballondor/news/02a5-20bba5196317-e0e34001e
